name: brain_tumor_seg
description: BraTS multi-class brain tumor segmentation using MONAI's SegResNet (brats_mri_segmentation bundle). Accepts a 3D BraTS MRI NIfTI volume and returns per-subject masks for ET, TC, WT.

help.summary: BraTS multi-class brain tumor segmentation (ET/TC/WT) using MONAI SegResNet.
notes: Requires a 4-channel (T1, T1ce, T2, FLAIR) BraTS MRI NIfTI volume.

runtime.notes: Requires GPU for 3D sliding-window inference (224x224x144 ROI).
